description_long: This is a medium-to-large dog with a robust, muscular build and a short, dense coat. The fur is predominantly black along the back and upper body, with tan and brown markings on the legs, face, and underside. The head is wedge-shaped with a strong muzzle, and the ears are large, upright, and pointed, giving the dog an alert and attentive expression. The tail is straight and held low, following the natural line of the back. The legs are sturdy and well-proportioned, indicating agility and strength. No collar or leash is visible, and the dog appears to be in a natural, standing posture.
description: A muscular, medium-to-large dog with a black and tan coat, upright pointed ears, and a straight, low tail. The dog has a strong, alert stance and no visible collar or leash.
description_view_0: Side profile showing the dog's strong build, black back, and tan legs with the tail held straight and down.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the upright, pointed ears, wedge-shaped head, and symmetrical facial markings.
description_view_2: Opposite side profile with visible tan and brown markings on the legs and underside, and the tail extending straight back.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the back of the head, upright ears, and the straight tail aligned with the body.
